items.title: Linagora - Senior Java Backend Developer - HN - 50M-60M - Hybrid
items.description:
**Location**: Hanoi, Vietnam

**WE NEED YOU**
Do you enjoy designing software that runs quickly and smoothly at scale?
At Twake Mail & Twake Calendar, we build open-source communication and collaboration products centered around scalability, open standards, and digital sovereignty.
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who can confidently navigate large codebases, deliver reliable and maintainable code, and quickly develop autonomy in a demanding engineering environment.
Beyond implementation, we value engineers who bring critical thinking, sound technical judgment, and real ownership to what they build, people who understand systems deeply, not just generate code from prompts.
If this sounds like you, this is perfect timing to join us!

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**
In this role, you will actively contribute to the open-source Apache James and Sabre DAV projects, as well as our Twake Mail and Twake Calendar products, by:
- ​​Helping to maintain and develop new features for these solutions.
- Adapting, customizing, and providing support for Twake Mail for new deployments
- Providing technical support to client projects using Apache James technology.

**QUALIFICATION**
• A good level of Java is required. An understanding of Scala and some knowledge of PHP are a plus.
• The candidate must be able to adapt to a demanding environment where high-quality, reliable, tested, documented, and well-structured code is expected.
• Be comfortable working with large codebases.
• Familiarity with open email standards is a plus (IMAP, SMTP, JMAP, Cal/CardDAV, OpenIDConnect, etc.).
• Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL data management tools is expected. We work with technologies such as Cassandra, PostgreSQL, S3 compatible, MongoDB, OpenSearch, RabbitMQ, Redis, and OpenLDAP.
• A good understanding of operational challenges is expected, both in terms of technical aspects (Kubernetes, Ansible, performance, etc.) and functional aspects (specific to email).
• An awareness of frontend and mobile development challenges is a plus (ReactJS/Flutter).
• Good level of English communication
Soft Skills
• Ability to communicate actively (communities, conferences).
• Results and quality-oriented, rather than rigid process-driven
• Ability to collaborate in an international and multicultural environment
• Flexibility and adaptability depending on the project
• Passion for the product and attention to detail
• Motivation to create a simple, reliable, and useful tool for users
• Proactive mindset

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US?**
• Involved in OpenSource community you follow your digital sovereignty ideal
• Collaboration with a diverse, highly skilled international team that values knowledge-sharing and innovation
• Opportunities to attend specialist conferences
• Access to internal learning resources, refresher courses to keep your skills up to date
• Freedom of a hybrid work model that balances remote and in-office work.
• Additional health insurance with extensive coverage and employee-centric benefits; annual health check-ups
• Competitive salary package, including a 13th-month bonus and lunch allowance
• Exciting company outings, team-building activities
• Modern working space filled with natural light
• Free coffee & tea

**Contact**
Homepage: linagora.com
LinkedIn:https://www.linkedin.com/in/linagora-vietnam-48a7b1107/
Email: vnhr@linagora.com
Phone number: 0901735987 (Signal/Zalo/Whatsapp) - Ms. Minh Anh, HR

items.title: Cartrack VN - Data Platform Engineer (ClickHouse, AI agents) - HCM - FT
items.description:
## Location 

* 408 Dien Bien Phu, Vuon Lai Ward, HCM

## Salary Range 
 
* Open Salary

## Requirements 

* Strong proficiency in one or more of the following: C, C++, C#, Go, or Rust.
* Proficiency in Python for scripting and automation.
* Experience with Airflow and complex ETL processes involving large datasets.
* Solid understanding of data architecture, database optimization, and monitoring best practices.
* Hands-on experience with Docker, Linux environments, and version control systems.

## Responsibilities 

* Design, build, and maintain data pipelines and ETL workflows using tools like Airflow.
* Develop monitoring systems to detect upstream data changes and maintain data freshness.
* Optimize relational and analytical databases for performance, including partitioning, indexing, and table design.
* Implement data quality, data lineage, and source documentation standards.
* Manage and tune analytics databases such as ClickHouse, Druid, StarRocks, or Doris.
* Work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, or Oracle.
* Leverage distributed query tools (e.g., Spark, Trino) to support scalable data analysis.
* Build, deploy, and monitor services in Linux environments, including shell scripting and debugging.
* Create and maintain Docker images, ensuring consistent environments for development and deployment.
* Integrate data workflows with CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitLab, GitHub, or Bitbucket.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Attractive salary
* Flat organization structure
* Lean & Agile: No unnecessary red tape.
* Quality First: We care about clean, scalable code.
* Execution Mindset: We focus on getting the job done.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects 

* Managing terabyte-scale data lake to ClickHouse on Kubernetes
* Opportunities involving LLM Agents (LlamaIndex, LangChain, Qdrant, …)

## Contact 
* if you are interested please feel free to reach out to Giang - Senior Recruiter at giang.vu@cartrack.com. Many thanks!

* Work with delivery teams to achieve success through development using CI/CD and DevOps practices, processes, and tooling; 
* Provide robust coding practices, solid unit/component test coverage, and debugging code. 


## Contact

* Zalo: 0939 236 757

items.title: Solutions Architect - B2B SaaS Product company - Open salary
items.description:
**About the role**
- The Solutions Architect is a senior, hands-on member of Inspectorio's Architecture team. This is an individual-contributor role focused on designing and delivering practical technical solutions to business problems. The Solutions Architect partners closely with the Engineering Leadership Team and Product Management to translate business strategy into well-architected, secure, and cost-effective solutions across all architectural domains: Application (including adherence to Application Security Standards), Data, Integration, Presentation, and Infrastructure.
- Working within an established architecture team, the Solutions Architect helps define, apply, and continuously improve the architectural patterns, standards, and reference architectures that optimize total cost of ownership and reduce cycle time for delivery through reuse and consistency. They are expected to be deeply current on modern engineering and AI practices - including GenAI solution design, agentic workflows, and AI-assisted software development - and to bring that expertise into Inspectorio's products and engineering process. 
- A successful candidate combines strong technical depth with sound business judgment, communicates clearly across technical and non-technical audiences, and is equally comfortable producing a strategic reference architecture and getting hands-on with a proof of concept. 

**What you'll do**
- Design end-to-end solution architectures for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment with Inspectorio's target architecture, enterprise patterns, and Application Security Standards. 
- Partner with engineering teams and product managers throughout the delivery lifecycle, providing architectural guidance, design reviews, and pragmatic decision support from discovery through production. 
- Contribute to the definition, documentation, and evolution of strategic platforms, architectural patterns, and reference architectures within the architecture community. 
- Apply architecture standards and governance in practice - helping teams adopt patterns, reuse components, and make sound build-vs-buy and technology-selection decisions. 
- Design AI and GenAI solution architectures, including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM gateway patterns, model selection and evaluation, vector/embedding stores, prompt and context management, and end-to-end observability and cost/token governance. 
- Architect agentic workflows and multi-agent systems - including tool/function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, orchestration, guardrails, human-in-the-loop controls, evaluation harnesses, and tracing. 
- Help define how AI coding assistants and agentic developer tooling (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI) are adopted, governed, and integrated into the SDLC to improve developer productivity, quality, and cycle time. 
- Continuously enhance the reliability, performance, scalability, and security of our products and platforms. 
- Produce clear technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and decision records (ADRs) that make designs understandable and actionable for engineering teams and stakeholders. 
- Build proofs of concept and reference implementations to de-risk new technologies and validate architectural approaches before broad adoption. 
- Act as a technical advisor and mentor to engineers and peers on architecture, modern engineering practices, and emerging technology trends. 
- Participate in the evaluation and selection of new software products, platforms, and AI tooling. 

**Qualifications**
- 6+ years of industry-relevant experience, including 4+ years as a solution, technical, or enterprise architect in a complex, ideally global, product or SaaS organization. 
- Demonstrated experience defining, designing, and implementing complex integration and distributed systems, including microservice and event-driven architectures, with an API-first mindset. 
- Proven ability to apply architecture standards and patterns practically to accelerate and enable delivery - balancing strategic intent with pragmatic execution. 
- Hands-on experience designing solutions on a major cloud platform (Google Cloud preferred; AWS or Azure acceptable), along with relevant middleware, messaging (e.g., Kafka/ESB), data, and infrastructure technologies. 
- Familiarity with technologies relevant to our products, including Python, Angular, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Google Cloud. 
- Practical experience architecting AI/GenAI solutions in production or near-production settings - RAG, LLM integration, evaluation, and the operational concerns (cost, latency, observability, safety) that come with them. 
- Working knowledge of agentic AI patterns and frameworks (e.g., agent orchestration, tool use, MCP) and the trade-offs involved in building reliable, observable agentic systems. 
- Hands-on familiarity with AI coding assistants and their role in the modern SDLC, including how to drive adoption, measure impact, and manage associated quality, security, and licensing considerations. 
- Awareness of responsible-AI and data-governance considerations, including handling of sensitive data (e.g., PII), prompt/data leakage risks, and model evaluation. 
- Excellent written and spoken English, with the ability to present ideas and concepts clearly and concisely to both technical and business audiences.

**_*This role is also open to Staff and Principal-level engineers with experience in design systems, cross-model dependencies, and platform solutions. We are particularly interested in candidates who have driven AI adoption in production environments and are ready to step up, take ownership, and grow within our organization._**

**Benefits:** 
- Remote-first environment 
- Flexible working hour, global team
- Full salary insurance 
- Premium healthcare PVI
- Unlimited days leave
- Well-being claim, lunch allowance, team building,..

items.title: Cartrack VN - Senior AI Engineer (Computer Vision) - HCM - FT
items.description:
## Location 

* 408 Dien Bien Phu, Vuon Lai Ward, HCM

## Salary Range 

* Open Salary

## Requirements 

* Minimum 6+ years of relevant experience in video/image detection, prediction, classification, or signal processing.
* Proficient with Python, PyTorch, and a strong academic background in CS, Engineering, Mathematics, or Statistics.
* A self-motivated engineer who prefers deep technical optimization over AI hype and enjoys collaborating in a fast-paced R&D hub.

## Responsibilities 

* Conceptualize and develop computer vision models to model driver behavior, road detection, signal detection, in cabin characteristics, etc.
* Provide signals based on video/image detection algorithms for other machine learning algorithms, such as road flow or traffic densities.
* Develop signal processing models as to characterize the attributes to a time series matrix.
* Test and put algorithms into a production ready state.
* Constructing solution concepts from insights using familiar or unfamiliar data sources or complete or partial data.
* Imputing the dependency between sensors and time series data.
* Design and build machine/deep learning and optimization algorithms efficiently
* Integrate, simulate, and test the impact of algorithms and features on the overall system
* Develop and execute necessary analyses, simulations, etc. to validate models and identify improvement opportunities
* Store, retrieve and visualize results in a manner that facilitates required analyses
* Effectively conceptualize analyses to business/product stakeholders

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Attractive salary
* Flat organization structure
* Lean & Agile: No unnecessary red tape.
* Quality First: We care about clean, scalable code.
* Execution Mindset: We focus on getting the job done.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects 

* We have worked on camera/ sensor related projects, but our Head has more interesting plans, I would prefer him to discuss further with you :P 
* Choose Cartrack VN if you prefer a fast-paced environment, love building robust, production-grade systems that handle massive real-world scale, and want to see your AI models directly impact global fleet safety and logistics efficiency.

## Contact 
* if you are interested please feel free to reach out to Giang - Senior Recruiter at giang.vu@cartrack.com. Many thanks!

items.title: [Part-time / Async] Senior Code Reviewer — Supply Chain ERP (React + Python + Postgres) · Hanoi preferred · ~5–8 hrs/week
items.description:
**Q&T Hi-Tech** is building a custom **Q&T Planning System** — an internal Supply Chain ERP web application to replace our current planning processes. The system covers ~25 modules: MRP, procurement (PR/PO), demand forecasting, multi-currency P&L, FX exposure tracking, working capital, cost-per-batch, customer profitability, segregation of duties, and more.

We are developing the system in-house using AI-assisted coding and are looking for a **senior developer to serve as our ongoing technical reviewer** — not to write code, but to be our second set of eyes and catch issues before they reach production.

**What you would do:**
- Review pull requests (PRs) or code drops asynchronously (written feedback, no mandatory calls)
- Flag security vulnerabilities, authentication gaps, and business logic errors
- Identify AI-generated code failure patterns: missing edge cases, transaction boundary issues, weak input validation
- Provide structured written feedback categorised by severity: Security / Correctness / Architecture / Performance
- Occasional architecture discussion at the start of new modules

**Tech stack:**
- Frontend: React (or Vue TBD)
- Backend: Python (FastAPI or Django) + PostgreSQL
- Domain: ERP / supply chain / manufacturing — complex business logic, financial data, multi-currency

**What we are looking for:**
- 6+ years of hands-on commercial software development experience, ideally with enterprise or ERP-class systems
- Comfortable reviewing AI-assisted code — knows what patterns to distrust
- Strong written communication — can prioritise findings clearly, not just leave inline comments
- Bonus: prior experience in manufacturing, supply chain, or fintech domains
- Hanoi-based preferred (for occasional in-person sync if needed); fully remote also considered

**Commitment:** ~5–8 hrs/week, async and flexible schedule. Ongoing retainer engagement. Starting date is from mid-June 2026

**Salary:** **400,000–700,000 VND/hour** depending on experience and domain fit.

**To apply:** Send a brief intro + GitHub profile or relevant past work to: **anhluong@qt-hitech.com**. We will then review them and if short-listed send a 200–300 line code sample. If the depth of feedback is right, we proceed to a retainer.

items.title: Remote Opportunity - Senior Software Engineer (Python) - Open salary
items.description:
**About the role**

- As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will be responsible for working with cross-functional teams, including Product Owners, Designers, and Quality Assurance Engineers, to conceptualize, develop, and deploy software features that meet customer needs.
- While this role is primarily backend-focused, our current priorities place a stronger emphasis on frontend capabilities. As such, we are open to hiring a Senior Software Engineer with either strong backend expertise in Python, or fullstack experience with a frontend focus in Angular alongside Python.

**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and Django. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions. 
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Utilize AI tools (e.g., code assistants, automated testing, log analyzers) to streamline development tasks and routine operations. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements. 
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards. 
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities. 
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues. 
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in Python and Django. 
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards. 
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.

**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and Django. 
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP. 
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture. 
- Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar. 
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery. 
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git. 
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services. 
- Experience using AI assistants in the development workflow (e.g., Copilot, Cursor). 
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams. 
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes 
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. 
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal.

**Nice to have**

- Experience with Angular (v18+) and modern frontend development. 
- Ability to contribute across the fullstack (backend + frontend). 
- Interest in AI-augmented development and modern engineering workflows.

**Benefit**

- Tax payment and full salary insurance coverage
- Premium healthcare PVI 
- Lunch allowance
- Well-being claim 
- Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
- Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
- Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
- Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 20+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.

Feel free to contact me at +84395392802 - Talent Acquisition Partner

* Investigate and fix bugs promptly to maintain system stability.
* Ensure security and compliance when handling sensitive customer data.

* Architect for scalability to accommodate a growing number of clients and users.
* Mentor junior developers to support their technical growth and team contributions.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Competitive renumeration package
* International Environment

* 15 days annual leave, 10 sick leave
* Annual Performance Bonus
* Company activities and events
* Learning and development plan

items.title: REMOTE - Principle Engineer/Solution Architect - Negotiable - Product Company in Aviation
items.description:
## Location 

* Remote from Vietnam 

## Salary Expectation

* Skill based, negotiate with company CEO in 1st interview

## Requirements 

- Academic Foundation: University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a relevant technical field.

- Proven Track Record: 6+ years in senior engineering, technical lead, or architecture roles delivering full-lifecycle production systems (requirements through to operations).

- Architectural Expertise: Strong experience designing scalable backend systems using microservices, event-driven patterns, and schedulers.

- Integration Skills: Expert knowledge of APIs, web services, and message queues.

- Data Strategy: Deep understanding of data modeling (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) with a focus on pragmatic reliability and access patterns.

- Modern Stack Familiarity: Experience with Python frameworks and React/TypeScript to produce designs that are ready for rapid engineering implementation.

- Cloud & DevOps: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Huawei), CI/CD pipelines, and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

- Communication: Ability to write clear design specs, lead design reviews, and explain technical trade-offs in clear English.

- Stakeholder Mastery: Proven ability to drive decisions and align business, IT, and vendor teams—even in ambiguous situations.

- Agile Methodology: Solid understanding of standard SDLC and Agile development practices.

- Industry Advantage: Prior experience in Technology Consulting, Aviation, or Logistics is a plus. (not a must)

- Culture Fit: A passion for the startup environment and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, diverse, and team-oriented setting.

### Responsibilities 

- Lead end-to-end solution design, including technology selection (build vs. buy), cloud services, and integration patterns.

- Translate business requirements into solution architecture and a clear delivery plan.

- Define and own functional and non-functional requirements (performance, scalability, security, reliability, maintainability).

- Produce key architecture artefacts (HLDs, diagrams, API and data designs, ADRs) to guide engineering teams.

- Facilitate architecture design reviews and secure alignment before development starts.

- Partner with engineers throughout delivery to ensure solutions are implemented as designed and risks are addressed early.

- Manage architecture-level risks and guide teams through trade-offs and design decisions.

- Promote engineering best practices and mentor team members on architectural thinking.

### You’ll be responsible for

* Building aviation product for global airports.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us 

- High-impact work with real-world systems and meaningful scale.

- Work alongside and learn from leading experts in technology and aviation sector from different countries.

- Merit-based, startup-style culture with flexibility and autonomy.

- Remote-first environment with strong learning and growth opportunities.

### Contact 

Zalo/Whatsapp: 0905328693 (Ms Nora Nguyen)
Email: nora.careertalk@gmail.com

items.title: Flexspace AI - Product Engineer - Remote - Contract
items.description:
## Location 

* Fully remote

## Salary Range

* Compensation up to 4k USD a month, full-time freelance contract (Vietnam, Turkey)

## Requirements

We prioritize these qualities top-down—technical skills can be acquired rapidly by candidates with raw intelligence, low ego, and willingness to work hard.

### Async-first communication excellence

* You write clear, structured messages, specs, and documentation that make meetings optional in a globally distributed team.
* You can explain complex product and technical decisions in writing to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders like operators, sales, and customer success.
* You keep teammates across the US, Canada, Israel, Turkey, Philippines and Vietnam unblocked with detailed PR descriptions, status updates, and decision logs rather than waiting for synchronous check-ins.

### Product-minded, high-agency ownership with speed bias

* You have high agency and accountability: you proactively clarify ambiguous problems, ask the right questions to stakeholders, remove blockers, and drive work from idea to impact without waiting for hand-holding.
* You are a fast learner who can quickly pick up new domains, tools, and concepts, especially around AI, pricing, and B2B SaaS workflows.
* You are genuinely interested in the product, customers, and business context, not just the tech stack.
* You treat engineering as a way to drive operator revenue, bookings, and occupancy—not just to ship code.
* You are comfortable making pragmatic trade-offs between scope, speed, and robustness, especially when iterating toward product–market fit.
* You prefer shipping a "minimum lovable" version this week and learning from operators over polishing in isolation.

### Technical versatility with strong fundamentals

* Track record of building and maintaining production web products, ideally in B2B SaaS.
* Our programming languages include Ruby, TypeScript, and Python. The majority of your time will be spent working in Ruby and TypeScript codebases.
* Strong fundamentals in system design, data modeling, API design, and debugging across the stack.
* Comfortable working across frontend, backend, and integrations, and jumping into unfamiliar parts of the codebase.
* Experience using AI coding assistants as leverage, not as a substitute for sound engineering judgment.

## Responsibilities

We're hiring a Product Engineer to build the e-commerce platform powering the next generation of coworking spaces. You'll work directly with founders and an international team across 6 countries to:

* Discover, design, and deliver product features that drive bookings, revenue, and occupancy for coworking operators.
* Shape the product experience and architecture of an AI-powered e-commerce platform end-to-end.
* Help define the culture, processes, and tooling of a remote, async-first engineering organization.

### What You'll Do

* Own problems end-to-end: work with founders and operators to understand needs, then spec, design, and ship product features that drive bookings and revenue.
* Build and evolve our SmartPricing and SmartMarketing agents—pricing rules, targeting logic, and performance monitoring.
* Create seamless booking experiences with instant payment from operator websites.
* Integrate with coworking CRMs, inventory systems, and analytics tools to sync data and prevent double bookings.
* Use AI tools (Cursor, Claude) to accelerate development while maintaining sound judgment on architecture and trade-offs.
* Write clear specs, RFCs, and PR descriptions that enable async collaboration across time zones.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Stock options and new MacBook upon successful probation
* AI tools budget (Cursor, Claude, GitHub Copilot)
* Founder-track learning at global scale—master product, engineering, and go-to-market for international B2B SaaS
* Flexspace AI is fully remote, with a multidisciplinary team across the US, Canada, Israel, Turkey, Philippines and Vietnam, supporting a genuinely async culture across time zones.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects

[Flexspace AI](https://flexspace.ai/) helps coworking operators maximize revenue and occupancy through an AI-powered e-commerce platform. We make flexible workspaces instantly discoverable, bookable, and profitable.

Core capabilities include:
* Real-time revenue optimization and booking insights via analytics dashboards.
* A frictionless booking engine embedded in operators' websites for instant online booking and payment.
* AI-powered SmartPricing and SmartMarketing Agents that optimize pricing and launch targeted campaigns automatically.
* Deep CRM and inventory integrations that prevent double bookings and improve attribution tracking.

## Contact
Homepage: [flexspace.ai](https://flexspace.ai/)
Apply at: https://jobs.polymer.co/flexspace/38159

items.title: DTalent's Client: CoderPush - Senior AI-Native Python Developer - Remote - FT
items.description:
# 🚀 We’re hiring: Senior AI-Native Python Developer 
**Location:** Remote (VN timezone)  
**Salary:** Up to 90M gross  

## About us
DTalent's Client - CoderPush is a remote-first team of 90+ engineers helping companies from startups to enterprises build high-quality software products.  
We value long-term partnerships, strong engineering culture, and continuous learning.

## Role
As a **Senior AI-Native Python Developer**, you’ll work at the intersection of **AI, automation, and cloud** to build production-ready solutions.

## Responsibilities
- Build AI-native systems using LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, LiteLLM, Semantic Kernel).  
- Design APIs with **FastAPI / NestJS**.  
- Develop automation pipelines for CI/CD & testing with LLMs.  
- Build scalable frontends (**React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS**).  
- Manage AWS infra (**Lambda, S3, RDS, Cognito, CloudWatch**).  

## Requirements
- 5+ years in **Python development** (AI/LLM applications).  
- Strong in **LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, agent frameworks**.  
- Proficient in **FastAPI, PostgreSQL (JSONB, full-text search)**.  
- Skilled in modern frontend (**React, TS, TailwindCSS**).  
- Experience with **AWS serverless, CI/CD, Docker, IaC**.  
- Good communication in **English + Vietnamese**.  

_Nice to have: RoR legacy, OAuth2, SaaS billing, OpenWebUI customization._  

## Benefits
- 🌍 Remote-first (work from anywhere)  
- 📅 Mon–Fri, 8h/day (VN timezone)  
- 🏖 22 paid leaves from 5th year  
- 💻 Work equipment support  
- 💰 Competitive salary + annual & performance bonuses  
- 🎓 Certification support & monthly coaching  
- 🏢 Optional office: Hanoi / HCMC  

## Hiring process
1. (Optional) Assessment  
2. Tech interview (live code)  
3. Client interview (1–2 rounds)  
4. Final with CP Founder + Offer  

_All rounds in English. Please ensure stable internet & camera._  

---

👉 Apply here: Tramcao@dtalent.vn

items.title: REDBEAN - Senior Backend/AI Developer - Saigon/Remote - FT
items.description:
As a Senior AI/Backend Engineer at Redbean, you will build the core infrastructure for our AI-powered entertainment and social network products. Redbean was founded by former engineers from Amazon, TikTok, and Quora, and is the third Vietnamese startup to receive investment from Y Combinator, the accelerator that helped launch companies like Airbnb, Reddit, Stripe, etc.

Redbean is developing innovative mobile apps in the AI, social, and gaming space for a global audience. This is a unique opportunity for engineers who want to explore the latest AI advancements and apply them to real-world products. We value independent thinking, relentless curiosity, and a passion for building great user experiences. If you want to build great products at the forefront of technology and challenge yourself in a dynamic startup environment, join us.

## Location

* Hybrid for candidates located in Saigon, Remote for candidates in Hanoi

## Salary Expectation

* $2,500-$4,000/month, plus stock options

## Requirements
* Strong curiosity about the world, AI advancements, and user behavior; ability to think independently (we seek proactive problem-solvers, not task-takers).
* Product and user-centric mindset; ability to learn quickly and be resourceful; problem-solving skills.
* High sense of responsibility and ownership.
* 3+ years of experience in backend development.
* Proven experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable backend systems and APIs.
* Proficiency in system design principles and best practices.
* Knowledge of common software design patterns and data structures.
* Bonus: Solid understanding and practical experience with AI concepts; direct experience with or a strong desire to work with generative AI (e.g., LLMs, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RAG), AI agents, and vector databases is a significant plus.

## Skills

* Backend Frameworks: Experience with relevant backend frameworks (e.g., Django, Flask, FastAPI for Python; Spring Boot for Java; Express.js for Node.js, etc.).
* API Design: Expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL.
* Cloud Platforms & DevOps: Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
* System Architecture: Ability to design scalable, reliable, and maintainable distributed systems.
* Bonus: Experience with LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Cohere, Anthropic) and techniques like prompt engineering, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), and fine-tuning. Understanding of AI agent frameworks and concepts.

## Responsibilities

* Design, build, and maintain robust, scalable, and high-performance backend systems and APIs to power AI-driven features in our mobile applications.
* Integrate and deploy Large Language Models (LLMs) and other generative AI technologies to create novel user experiences.
* Actively research, prototype, and implement cutting-edge AI advancements, particularly in generative AI and AI agents, to drive product innovation and solve complex user problems.
* Collaborate closely with product, design, and other engineering team members to define technical requirements, design robust AI solutions, and deliver high-quality features.
* Optimize backend systems, data pipelines, and AI models for performance, scalability, latency, stability, and maintainability.
* Establish and champion best practices for backend development, data processing, and AI integration within the engineering team.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Directly apply the latest in generative AI, LLMs, and AI agent technologies to build innovative global products.
* Influence product and AI strategy in an environment that values independent thinking and real ownership.
* Collaborate with and learn from a high-caliber, YC-backed team (ex-Amazon, TikTok, Quora) in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.
* Be a core part of a passionate team creating next-generation social and gaming experiences for users worldwide.

## Projects

* Develop a ground-breaking AI social/gaming mobile app with us

## Contact

**Submit your CV/resume at long@tinai.com**
Homepage: https://redbean.ai
Email: long@tinai.com

items.title: REMOTE WORKING - Backend Developer (Go/ Python)
items.description:
**Singapore-based | Data Intelligence Product | Fully Remote**

Join a fast-growing Singapore-based data intelligence company that helps businesses build meaningful customer relationships in the AI-driven world. Our secure and scalable platform empowers leading brands—from banks to e-commerce—to deliver personalized experiences, all while upholding privacy and data security.
We are a remote-first company with a globally distributed team of 60+ professionals across Southeast Asia, Australia, New Zealand, Europe, and the Middle East.
We are looking for a Medior Backend Engineer to join our remote engineering team and contribute to the development of our core product.

**What You'll Do**

- Design, develop, and maintain the server-side components of a modern data intelligence platform.
- Tackle challenges around performance, scalability, observability, and multi-cloud infrastructure.
- Collaborate on architectural decisions, infrastructure improvements, and AI feature integrations.
- Build prototypes, optimize production code, and contribute to improving legacy systems.

**What We're Looking For**
_Technical Skills:_

- Proven experience building production-level backend systems (Python and Go are a plus, but any language is welcome).
- Familiarity with SOLID principles and test-driven development.
- Solid command of English communication in a remote team environment.

_Mindset & Culture Fit:_

- Versatile – from quick prototypes to scalable systems.
- Proactive – comfortable identifying and fixing tech debt.
- Collaborative – values genuine team bonding, both online and offline.
- Curious – always learning and experimenting with new technologies.

_Some Challenges You May Tackle_

- Handling billions of customer events across databases.
- Improving performance and optimizing APIs.
- Migrating to Kubernetes and managing multi-cloud environments (GCP, AWS, Azure).
- Enhancing monitoring and alerting systems.
- Implementing AI & LLM integrations for intelligent automation.

**Your Role, Your Way**
We don’t box people into rigid job descriptions. Whether your passion lies in backend systems, DevOps, or AI, you can shape your role based on your strengths and our evolving needs.

**Contact:** Zalo 0941496526 - Hà Như

items.title: REMOTE FULLTIME - SENIOR CLOUD ENGINEER - ATTRACTIVE SALARY + BENEFITS
items.description:
**Work Arrangement:** Fully Remote
**Compensation:** Negotiable + 13th-month fixed salary
**Note:** This is a full-time role—no side jobs.

Are you passionate about building robust, scalable, and secure cloud infrastructure?
Do you enjoy solving tough challenges and working with cutting-edge technologies? Our client is seeking a Senior Cloud Engineer to join their team and play a key role in evolving their Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) offering.

If you're a proactive engineer with deep cloud expertise and a love for mentoring and collaboration, this could be the perfect next step for you!

****🔧 What You'll Be Doing****

- Design, build, and monitor cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure platforms.
- Deploy and manage both open-source tools and proprietary cloud-based applications.
- Handle troubleshooting for customer-facing systems, ensuring high availability and performance.
- Architect and maintain secure and resilient systems across cloud environments.
- Contribute to the overall design of the PaaS architecture.
- Support knowledge-sharing and growth by mentoring fellow engineers.
- Participate in a rotating on-call schedule to handle incidents and ensure minimal downtime.

**✅ What You Bring**

- Strong experience managing Kubernetes clusters with a focus on high availability and deep troubleshooting.
- Hands-on with Helm, including chart creation and maintenance.
- Proficiency in AWS or Azure, especially around secure and scalable infrastructure design.
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines to automate deployments and streamline workflows.
- Familiarity with monitoring tools like Prometheus and Grafana—you know how to set up meaningful dashboards and alerts.
- Solid grasp of Infrastructure as Code (especially Terraform).

_**🌟 Bonus Skills**_

- Experience with both AWS and Azure environments.
- Familiar with GitLab CI and building out pipelines.
- Understanding of cloud and Kubernetes networking: Private Link, VPC/VNet Peering, CNI, Ingress, service mesh, etc.
- Hands-on with ArgoCD and GitOps workflows.
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL administration.

**🎁 Benefits & Perks**

- Full salary during probation
- 13th-month guaranteed salary
- 15 days of paid annual leave
- Premium health insurance
- Language course access
- Conference tickets (top industry events)
- Learning platforms like Udemy
- Fun company events: themed New Year parties, summer gatherings, and more

**🧩 Hiring Process**
Round 1: Screening with Recruiter
Round 2: Technical Interview with the EU team
Round 3: (Optional) Final chat with EU team members
_All interviews will be conducted online._

Contact: hanhunguyen1999@gmail.com / Zalo/Tele: 0941496526

items.title: [Dikshatek] - [Senior NodeJs Engineer] - [Remote/HCM] - [Fulltime]
items.description:
## Location 

* Remote 100% - prefer located in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

## Salary Expectation

* Min 50,000,000 VND Gross (Negotiable depending on experience)

## About The Job

* Our client is a US-based Nextgen digital health platform company. They develop unique new AI/ML powered products for connecting patients and providers that empower users to take control of their health records and overall wellness. 
* They are well funded through our investment partners to enable us to scale product services in the US and then move globally into chosen target markets.  


## Requirements 

### Must Have 

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or a closely related field.
* Minimum of 7 years of professional experience in software development.
* Strong prior experience with NodeJS frameworks and REST APIs is essential.
* Hands-on experience working with Kafka, Redis, and Logstash.
* Advanced knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Elasticsearch).
* Understanding of data modeling and relational databases.
* Proficient in debugging, troubleshooting, and problem-solving.
* Experience with ReactJS/NextJS and Prompt Engineering is a significant plus.
* Experience in the healthcare industry is preferred.
* A strong desire to learn, grow, and embrace responsibility and accountability in a highly autonomous environment.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* Experience in a startup working environment is a plus.


### Nice To Have
* Experience with Google, AWS, cloud-based development, experience working with Docker Containers, Kubernetes


## You’ll Be Responsible For

* As part of the Software Engineering team, you will have various opportunities and responsibilities to:
* Cover gathering requirements to design, coding, testing, deploying, and maintain our software
* Develop the microservices system with high requirements for performance, scalability, and security
* Collaborate with product, frontend and QA team to deliver high quality product


## Why It Would Be Awesome To Work With Us 

* Fulltime remote working
* Annual leaves
* Full SHUI
* ESOP
* Annually bonus

## Interview Process:
* Round 1 (Optional): Quick call with HRD from client side
* Round 2: Take-home test on Hacker Earth
* Round 3: Online technical interview with global development team
* Round 4 (Optional): Interview with CEO (30’)
_The interviews usually take place at 7:00 PM_


## Contact 
Kindly contact me for further details about the job
* 𝗣𝗵𝗼𝗻𝗲/𝗭𝗮𝗹𝗼/𝗧𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺: 0939 236 757
* 𝗦𝗸𝘆𝗽𝗲: thao.vo_14

items.description:
# Full Stack Developer (ReactJS + NestJS)
**English required** 

## **About us**
At FintechHQ, we're passionate about transforming the way technology solutions are delivered. We're a dynamic team of engineers, designers, and business analysts who blend technical expertise with commercial strategy and implementation experience to create innovative solutions.
We are seeking a talented Senior Full Stack Engineer to join our team.

## **Responsibilities**
- Perform continuous health checks on our system and data, ensuring smooth and efficient operations.  
- Actively respond to customer feedback, making necessary adjustments to enhance the user experience.  
- Implement and scale new features to meet increasing client demand and improve system functionality.  
- Generate innovative ideas for product improvement, continuously enhancing value for real estate professionals.  
- Adapt to various tasks based on the organization’s current needs.  
- Collaborate closely with other engineers and team members, reporting directly to the Manager to foster a supportive working environment.  

## **Requirements**
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).  
- Familiarity with backend systems and experience with TypeScript applications is essential.  
- Proficiency in **ReactJS** and **NestJS**.  
- A positive attitude and excellent interpersonal skills are crucial for effective collaboration within a remote team.  
- Strong desire to learn new things and adapt to changing circumstances and requirements.  
- Knowledge of **real estate data** (e.g., address information) is a strong plus.  
- Excellent **English communication skills** (both written and verbal) are crucial for effective collaboration within a remote team.  

## **Contact Us**  
📩 **Email:** [annie@fintechhq.solutions](mailto:annie@fintechhq.solutions)
